advantages.title: Why Choose TokenFusion
advantages.subtitle: One token, unlimited possibilities.
advantages.item1Desc: One balance works across chat, image, video and code generation.
advantages.item2Desc: Your data is encrypted and never used for training.
advantages.item4Desc: Available in 7 languages with localized support.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: A universal token is a single balance that works across all AI features — chat, image, video and code generation. You only need to recharge once.
faq.q2: Do I need a credit card to start?
faq.a2: No. You can start generating for free without a credit card. Just create a free account to get 2,000 tokens.
faq.a3: We support GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, Gemini, DeepSeek, DALL·E, Stable Diffusion, FLUX and more — all through one unified API.
faq.q4: Can I use the API in my own application?
faq.a4: Yes. After creating an account, you can generate an API key and integrate TokenFusion into your applications using our OpenAI-compatible API and SDKs.
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions
faq.contactHint: Our team is here to help you get started.
faq.a5: We use a universal token system. You recharge tokens once and use them across all features. Different operations consume different amounts of tokens based on the model and complexity.
faq.a6: Yes. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We never use your prompts or generated content to train AI models.
faq.a7: Yes, you can cancel anytime. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing cycle, and no further charges will apply.
faq.a8: Our platform supports 7 languages: English, Chinese, Thai, Vietnamese, Indonesian, Malay, and Filipino.

chat.title: AI Chat - Multi-turn Conversations
chat.description: Engage in intelligent multi-turn conversations powered by GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, and more. Get instant, accurate answers to any question.
chat.keywords: AI chat, chatbot, GPT-4o, Claude, conversation, AI assistant
chat.feature1: Supports GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, Gemini, DeepSeek and more
chat.feature2: Real-time streaming responses for instant feedback
chat.feature4: Universal token billing across all models

image.title: AI Image - Text to Image Generation
image.description: Transform your ideas into stunning visuals with DALL·E, FLUX, and Stable Diffusion. Generate high-quality images from text prompts.
image.keywords: AI image generation, text to image, DALL-E, FLUX, Stable Diffusion, AI art
image.feature1: Powered by DALL·E 3, FLUX, Stable Diffusion and more
image.feature2: Multiple sizes and aspect ratios supported
image.feature3: Batch generation up to 10 images at once

video.title: AI Video - Text/Image to Video
video.description: Create dynamic videos from text or images with cutting-edge AI models. Perfect for content creators and marketers.
video.keywords: AI video generation, text to video, image to video, AI animation
video.feature1: Generate videos from text prompts or images

code.title: AI Code - Natural Language to Code
code.description: Generate production-ready code from natural language descriptions. Supports Python, JavaScript, Go, and more.
code.keywords: AI code generation, code assistant, programming AI, Copilot alternative
code.feature1: Supports Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Go, Rust and more
